response.overview: Behind the Shield is a reflective and immersive documentary that explores the complex socio-political landscape of Lebanon through the lens of a dash camera installed in the artist’s car. Capturing footage from 2018 to 2020, the film documents two tumultuous years in Beirut’s history: the beginning of the October 2019 protests, the eerie emptiness of the streets during the COVID-19 lockdowns, and the night of the devastating Beirut port explosion on August 4, 2020.
response.title: Behind The Shield
